summary: Completed testing of Age Verification (16+) feature in BOTH user registration (/register) and business registration (/business/register) forms. All tests passed - age verification shows day/month/year selectors, displays cake icon when empty, green check when 16+, red rejection when under 16. Country selector with phone code prefix also working correctly in both forms.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health - API healthy - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with birth_date and country fields - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with Colombia country (CO) - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/register without birth_date (optional field) - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/register with owner_birth_date field - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/register with Colombia country - PASSED
Frontend USER REGISTRATION: Page loads with data-testid='register-page' - PASSED
Frontend USER REGISTRATION: Age verification component found (data-testid='age-verification') - PASSED
Frontend USER REGISTRATION: Day/Month/Year selectors present (data-testid='age-day-select', 'age-month-select', 'age-year-select') - PASSED
Frontend USER REGISTRATION: Selecting age <16 (2015) shows red rejection 'Debes tener al menos 16 años para registrarte' - PASSED
Frontend USER REGISTRATION: Selecting age >=16 (2000) shows green '25 años — Puedes continuar' - PASSED
Frontend USER REGISTRATION: Form submission blocked for minors with toast error - PASSED
Frontend USER REGISTRATION: Full registration flow works with valid age (redirects to /verify-phone) - PASSED
Frontend BUSINESS REGISTRATION: Page loads with data-testid='business-register-page' - PASSED
Frontend BUSINESS REGISTRATION: Country selector with search (data-testid='business-country-select') - PASSED
Frontend BUSINESS REGISTRATION: Changing country from Mexico to Colombia updates phone prefix from +52 to +57 - PASSED
Frontend BUSINESS REGISTRATION: Phone number limited to 10 digits with counter (10/10) - PASSED
Frontend BUSINESS REGISTRATION: Age verification in Step 1 with 'Edad del responsable del negocio' label - PASSED
Frontend BUSINESS REGISTRATION: Age verification rejects minors (2018 = under 16) with red message - PASSED
Frontend BUSINESS REGISTRATION: Age verification accepts valid age (1990 = 36 years) with green message - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: AgeVerification component is well-implemented with proper data-testid attributes
Age calculation is correct and handles edge cases (birthday not yet passed this year)
Visual feedback is clear: cake icon (empty), green check (valid), red stop (invalid)
Form validation properly blocks submission for minors with clear error message
Country selector with search functionality works correctly
Phone prefix updates automatically when country changes
Backend models (UserCreate, BusinessCreate) properly accept birth_date and owner_birth_date fields
seed_data_creation: Created test users with birth_date and country fields during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Age Verification feature is fully implemented and tested in BOTH registration forms. Key points: (1) AgeVerification component uses data-testid='age-verification' wrapper, (2) Day/Month/Year selectors have data-testid='age-day-select', 'age-month-select', 'age-year-select', (3) Result badge has data-testid='age-result', (4) Visual feedback: cake icon when empty, green check when 16+, red stop when under 16, (5) Form submission is blocked for minors with toast error, (6) Business registration has age verification in Step 1 inside 'Edad del responsable del negocio' box, (7) Country selector updates phone prefix automatically.
